review: Full of bugs, can't even add an item to cart to order. You tap the button "add to bag" and nothing happens.

infuriating, some type of geo lock going on... app works flawless away from any restaurant, but at restaurant it crashes, doesn't acknowledge you're there, or drops your order while billing you. other times you have the app pre opened in preparation for the drive through and still have a 10-20 second gap trying to get an order code. triple asking you you're location is annoying. and, recently credit card auto fill is a 1 in 8 chance that you don't have to manually select it every time.
